name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability, gesture, or UX improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

<!-- What are you trying to do today? Why is the current behaviour
     getting in your way? -->

## Proposal

<!-- Your suggested solution. Sketches of gestures, dialog flow,
     or data-model changes welcome. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Anything you tried or thought about. -->

## Scope

- [ ] Affects the pure-Python core (tree / inheritance / labels / search / storage)
- [ ] Affects the NVDA integration layer (plugin / navigator / walker)
- [ ] Affects the wx dialogs (ui/*)
- [ ] Docs only
